calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker, Esq., counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner (appearing by video conference); Arthur Bradford and Antoinette Know, interested persons (observing by video conference).

Court and counsel briefly discuss the circumstances occasioning the petition and to what extent Court supervision is required. After discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission with the intention to grant the pending petition in part but deny the request for Court supervision. Court and counsel briefly review the portions of the proposed Order that will require excision in light of the Court's denial of court supervision, including Paragraphs 3, 5, and 6.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
EX PARTE PETITION TO APPOINT TEMPORARY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE TO ADDRESS URGENT ISSUES REGARDING TRUST PROPERTY
